CommentSpacing:SessionConfig.kt$SessionConfig$//если игра не по командам, то значение 0

LongParameterList:Decision.kt$Decision$( @field:Id @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.UUID) var id: UUID? = null, @field:ManyToOne(fetch = FetchType.LAZY) @field:JoinColumn(name = "session_id", nullable = false) var session: Session? = null, @field:ManyToOne(optional = false) @field:JoinColumn(name = "round_id", nullable = false) var round: Round? = null, @field:ManyToOne(optional = false) @field:JoinColumn(name = "responder_id", nullable = false) var responder: User? = null, @field:OneToOne( cascade = [CascadeType.PERSIST, CascadeType.MERGE, CascadeType.REMOVE, CascadeType.REFRESH], optional = false, orphanRemoval = true ) @field:JoinColumn(nullable = false) var offer: Offer? = null, @field:Column(nullable = false) var decision: Boolean, @field:Column(nullable = false, updatable = false) var createdAt: Date = Date(), )

LongParameterList:Offer.kt$Offer$( @field:Id @field:GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.UUID) var id: UUID? = null, @field:ManyToOne(fetch = FetchType.LAZY) @field:JoinColumn(name = "session_id", nullable = false) var session: Session? = null, @field:ManyToOne(optional = false) @field:JoinColumn(name = "round_id", nullable = false) var round: Round? = null, @field:ManyToOne(optional = false) @field:JoinColumn(name = "proposer_id", nullable = false) var proposer: User? = null, @field:ManyToOne @field:JoinColumn(name = "responder_id", nullable = true) var responder: User? = null, @field:Column(nullable = false) var offerValue: Int, @field:Column(nullable = false, updatable = false) var createdAt: Date = Date(), )

LongParameterList:PlayerGameplayService.kt$PlayerGameplayService$( private val eventPublisher: EventPublisherService, private val sessionRepository: SessionRepository, private val sessionService: SessionService, private val roundRepository: RoundRepository, private val offerRepository: OfferRepository, private val decisionRepository: DecisionRepository, private val userService: UserService, private val gameplayService: CoreGameplayService )

LongParameterList:Session.kt$Session$( @field:Id @field:GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.UUID) var id: UUID? = null, @field:Column(nullable = false) var displayName: String = "", @field:Enumerated(EnumType.STRING) @field:Column(nullable = false) var state: SessionState = SessionState.CREATED, @field:Column(nullable = false) var createdAt: Date = Date(), @field:ManyToOne(optional = false) var admin: User? = null, var openToConnect: Boolean = true, @OneToOne @JoinColumn(name = "current_round_id") var currentRound: Round? = null, @OneToMany( mappedBy = "session", cascade = [CascadeType.PERSIST, CascadeType.MERGE, CascadeType.REMOVE], orphanRemoval = true ) var rounds: MutableSet<Round> = mutableSetOf(), @field:Embedded var config: SessionConfig? = null, @field:OneToMany( mappedBy = "session", cascade = [CascadeType.PERSIST, CascadeType.MERGE, CascadeType.REMOVE], orphanRemoval = true ) var teams: MutableSet<Team> = mutableSetOf(), @field:ManyToMany(cascade = [CascadeType.MERGE], fetch = FetchType.EAGER) var members: MutableSet<User> = mutableSetOf(), @field:ManyToMany(cascade = [CascadeType.MERGE]) var observers: MutableSet<User> = mutableSetOf(), )
MaxLineLength:AdminGameplayService.kt$AdminGameplayService$// session.currentRound здесь: либо newRound (перешли), либо старый currentRound c phase=FINISHED (кончились раунды) — не null
MaxLineLength:AuthService.kt$AuthService$logger.info("Попытка быстрой регистрации пользователя с ником='${createUserRequest.nickname}' и ролью=${createUserRequest.role}")
MaxLineLength:CoreGameplayService.kt$CoreGameplayService$logger.info("Публикую оффер {} игроку {} в раунде {} сессии {}", offer.id, responderId, round.roundNumber, sessionId)
MaxLineLength:Decision.kt$Decision$return this::class.simpleName + "( id = $id , round = $round , responder = $responder , offer = $offer , decision = $decision )"
MaxLineLength:EventPublisherService.kt$EventPublisherService$description = "Персональная доставка оффера конкретному респонденту (userId). Используется в режиме shuffle."
MaxLineLength:JwtAuthenticationFilter.kt$JwtAuthenticationFilter$if (SecurityContextHolder.getContext().authentication != null) log.debug("Пользователь уже аутентифицирован, пропускаем фильтр")
MaxLineLength:JwtStompChannelInterceptor.kt$JwtStompChannelInterceptor$throw InvalidJwtException("Невалидный jwt (не удалось извлечь пользователя), попробуйте с повторить логин")
MaxLineLength:Offer.kt$Offer$return this::class.simpleName + "( id = $id , round = $round , proposer = $proposer , responder = $responder , offerValue = $offerValue )"
MaxLineLength:Round.kt$Round$return this::class.simpleName + "( id = $id , session = $session , roundNumber = $roundNumber , roundPhase = $roundPhase )"
MaxLineLength:Session.kt$Session$return this::class.simpleName + "( id = $id , displayName = $displayName , state = $state , createdAt = $createdAt , admin = $admin , config = $config )"

MaxLineLength:SessionConfigDto.kt$SessionConfigDto$@Schema(description = "Конфигурация сессии. Кросс-инвариант: для FREE_FOR_ALL numTeams=0; для TEAM_BATTLE numTeams>=2. Числовые поля не должны быть null (валидируется на уровне сервиса).")
MaxLineLength:SessionService.kt$SessionService$if (session.admin == observer) throw SessionJoinRejectedException("Вы на можете подключиться к сессии в качестве зрителя, так как вы ее администратор")
MaxLineLength:SessionService.kt$SessionService$if (session.admin == user) throw SessionJoinRejectedException("Вы на можете подключиться к сессии в качестве участника, так как вы ее администратор")

MaxLineLength:SessionService.kt$SessionService$if (session.members.size >= config.numPlayers) throw SessionJoinRejectedException("В сессии $sessionId достигнуто максимальное количество игроков (${session.members.size} из ${config.numPlayers})")
MaxLineLength:SessionService.kt$SessionService$val round = session.currentRound?: throw IdNotFoundException("Текущий раунд null сессия ${session.displayName} еще не началась")

MaxLineLength:User.kt$User$return this::class.simpleName + "( id = $id , nickname = $nickname , role = $role , createdAt = $createdAt )"
